title: Sifu
description: Free, open-source action logger for macOS. Records your workflows, detects patterns, generates SOPs automatically. Privacy-first.

title: 📷 Snaptastic
description: Free, open-source screenshot beautifier. Auto-watches your folder, adds backgrounds, corners, shadows. 8 templates. Install with your agent.

title: Google Drive Skill
description: Read docs, analyze sheets, build slides — all through your Cowork agent. Install in 2 minutes.

title: AI Hunter 2.0
description: Deterministic AI pattern scanner. Dual eval with 200+ experiments of research baked in. Scores your writing 0-100. Finds exactly which sentences to rewrite.

title: BrowserMonkey
description: Sniff once, Replay forever. Browser automation that skips the UI — intercepts fetch/XHR calls on any site and replays them 10-100x faster than clicking. Works on the 90% of SaaS that won't give you an API.
